items.summary: Fix the Work Order button on the Service page (ServicePage.tsx) so that clicking it correctly opens the work order detail or completion dialog. The button must be fully functional and respond to click events without errors.

Revert CashierPage.tsx to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Remove any changes introduced in Version 16 through Version 19 that altered the cashier page's UI, logic, or behavior, restoring it to the stable Version 15 state.

Revert InventoryPage.tsx to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Remove any changes introduced in Version 16 through Version 19 that altered the inventory page's UI, logic, or behavior, restoring it to the stable Version 15 state.
